challenge.title: Korak 17
challenge.description:
Objekat TVSeries će biti instanciran sa dodatnim atributima u odnosu na svog roditeljskog Movie. Stoga, kreirajte metod __init__ sa sledećim parametrima: self, title, year, director, duration, seasons, i total_episodes.

Unutar metode __init__, dodelite seasons i total_episodes atributima istog imena.

challengeFiles.name: main

tests.text: Your __init__ method should have the following parameters: self, title, year, director, duration, seasons, and total_episodes.
You should assign seasons to self.seasons inside your __init__ method.
You should assign total_episodes to self.total_episodes inside your __init__ method.

challengeFiles.name: main
